blog.listSubtitle: Practical guides, planning tips and stories from our trip designers on the ground.
blog.empty: No posts yet — check back soon.

hero.title: Travel the cradle of civilisation, the way it deserves.
hero.subtitle: Hand-crafted itineraries led by licensed Egyptologists. Small groups, 5★ Nile cruises, and a ground team on call 24/7 from the moment you land.

home.customBody: Tell us about your dates, your travel style, and the people coming with you. A trip designer will reply within 24 hours with a quote and three itinerary options.

whyUs.title: Six reasons our guests come back.
whyUs.guidesBody: Every guide is degree-trained and tourism-board licensed — no hop-on commentary, real scholarship.
whyUs.hotelsBody: We've stayed in every hotel we book. Sea-view, garden-view, family room — we know the difference.
whyUs.groupsBody: Capped at 12 guests, or fully private with your own guide and vehicle. No coach-tour crush.
whyUs.supportBody: WhatsApp your local trip manager any time. Lost luggage, sandstorm, missed flight — we fix it.
whyUs.pricingBody: What you pay covers entries, transfers, internal flights, and tips. No surprise add-ons mid-trip.
whyUs.flexibleBody: Cancel up to 30 days before for a full refund minus deposit. Re-book free up to 7 days out.

destinationsPage.title: Where will you go?
destinationsPage.subtitle: We cover every corner of Egypt plus our favourite add-ons across the Middle East. Pick a destination to see the tours that include it.

destination.askCustom: Ask us about a custom trip →

about.title: Cairo-based. Family-run. Built around the people who travel with us.
about.intro: We started in 2014 with three guides and a single Nile cruiser. Today we run small-group and private trips across Egypt, Jordan and the Red Sea — but we still answer every email ourselves. We're licensed by the Egyptian Tourism Authority and accredited by IATA.
about.step1Body: Honeymoon, family with kids, photography focus, return visit — every itinerary starts with a 30-minute call.
about.step2Body: Within 48 hours you get three draft itineraries at different price points, with hotel options for each leg.
about.step3: You travel, we stay on call
about.step3Body: Your trip designer is your single contact from quote to flight home. WhatsApp 24/7, in-country team in every city.
about.ctaBody: Send us a few details and we'll get back to you within a day.

contact.title: Talk to a trip designer.
contact.subtitle: Tell us a little about the trip you're dreaming of and we'll reply with a tailored quote within 24 hours.
contact.officeAddress: 5 Talaat Harb St., Downtown Cairo, Egypt
contact.tradeBody: For travel agents and tour operators wanting to resell our trips:

footer.tagline: Curated tours of Egypt, Jordan and the Red Sea. IATA-licensed operator. Cairo office, ground teams in every city we visit.

booking.successBody: We've emailed your booking reference. A trip designer will reach out within 24 hours to confirm dates and start arrangements.
booking.cancelBody: No worries — nothing was charged. You can try again or talk to a trip designer.

notFound.title: That page wandered off into the desert.
notFound.body: Let's get you back on the map.
